CurrentIssues.ID: FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `an entry past its ttl is never returned by search`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `an entry past its ttl is not counted by size`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `clear can target a single scope`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `clear with no scope empties the whole store`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `concurrent reads and writes leave a consistent store`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `concurrent writers all land`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `put replaces the entry with the same id rather than duplicating it`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `put stores an entry that search then finds`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `remove deletes only its target`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `remove reports whether an entry was actually there`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `search keeps the best entries when the limit truncates`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `search never returns more than the limit`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `search on a scope with no entries is empty`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `search only returns entries in the requested scope`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `search returns the closest entries first`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `search similarities are non-increasing`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `size counts one scope and the whole store`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `touch on a present entry is safe and keeps it findable`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `touch on an absent id does nothing`()
FunctionNaming:CacheStoreContract.kt$CacheStoreContract$@Test public fun `without a ttl an entry never expires`()
